items.title: Schedule catch-up with Boris (Blast Security) about fundraising round
items.context: Email from borisv@blast.security on Jun 4: Boris missed the Shabbat Dinner invite but wants to reconnect. 'I would love to catch up either Friday or Monday morning.' Richie had reached out about 'the round you're pulling together.'

items.title: Schedule call with Gabriel Kreiman (Engramme) re: new term sheet
items.context: Email from gabriel@engramme.com on Jun 2: 'We received a new term sheet. Before signing term sheets, we wanted to see if there's a way for us to work together. Do you have a few minutes to catch up?'

items.title: Share ballpark commitment amount for Opti's round ($15-20M at $75-90M pre)
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on Jun 3: 'It will help me make the internal process quicker if you could share a ballpark amount of what you'd like to commit if we end up with a round of about $15-$20m at $75m-$90m pre money valuation.'

items.title: Follow up with Barak (Opti) for post-board-meeting updates
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on Jun 3: 'We actually have our board meeting tomorrow, so I think I'll have concrete updates to share by early next week.' Board meeting was Jun 4 — follow up is due.

items.title: Send Banxware intro for Prism Layer (Simone Garreau)
items.context: Email thread May 29-31: Logan committed to sending intro to Banxware after in-person meeting with Simone. Simone said 'I'd be especially grateful for introductions to the teams at Banxware and SumUp.'

items.title: Check if SumUp is interested in meeting Prism Layer
items.context: Email from logan@fin.capital on May 31: 'Will see if SumUp is interested in meeting — they are a scaled / late stage company and tend to build in-house.' Simone requested the intro for Berlin meetings.

items.title: Prep for Deloitte + Fin Capital + Kindo meeting
items.context: Calendar event 'Zoom | Deloitte + Fin Capital' on Jun 9 with Deloitte (Kunchala, Ortiz), Kindo (ron@kindo.ai), and full Fin Capital team. Appears to be a portfolio company introduction.

items.title: Prep for Workday quarterly catch-up
items.context: Calendar event 'Workday <> Fin Capital Quarterly Catch-up' on Jun 10 with multiple Workday attendees (Magaro, McGann, Ospina, Greene, Rafferty, Wantman, Ray) and Fin Capital team.

items.title: Upload YC batch companies to pipeline
items.context: Calendar reminder 'Upload YC' on Jun 10 at 12:15pm ET — appears to be a task reminder for uploading YC batch data.
